name: Rahul Sharma
resume_text: EDUCATION: B.Tech in Computer Science, CGPA: 9.1. TECHNICAL SKILLS: Python, Go, Kubernetes, Docker, PostgreSQL, React, System Design. EXPERIENCE: Software Engineer Intern at Google (Summer 2024): Built a scalable ingestion pipeline using Go and GCP Pub/Sub, handling 1M+ messages/second. Reduced latency by 40%. Backend Developer at CDC IIT Kharagpur (2023): Led a team of 4 to refactor the ERP system portal using Node.js and Postgres. Implemented JWT authentication and caching with Redis. PROJECTS: Mini-K8s (Personal Project): Built a lightweight container orchestrator from scratch in Go. Features included pod scheduling, basic networking, and a CLI interface. E-Commerce Microservices: Deployed a full-stack Next.js app with Django microservices running on a Raspberry Pi Kubernetes cluster. POSITIONS OF RESPONSIBILITY: General Secretary of Technology Students Gymkhana.

name: Sneha Gupta
resume_text: EDUCATION: Mathematics and Computing, CGPA: 9.6. SKILLS: Python, PyTorch, CUDA, LangChain, Vector Databases, C++, SQL, Machine Learning. EXPERIENCE: Quant Trading Intern at Jane Street (Summer 2024): Developed low-latency statistical arbitrage models in C++. Optimized memory access patterns to reduce tick-to-trade time by 12 microseconds. ML Research Intern at KGP AI Lab (2023): Fine-tuned LLaMA-7B on custom datasets using LoRA. Reduced hallucination rates by 25% for domain-specific medical QA. PROJECTS: RAG Document Assistant: Built a LangChain-based pipeline with ChromaDB vector store for answering questions over 500+ page PDF documents. Deployed using FastAPI. Options Pricing Engine: Implemented Black-Scholes and Monte Carlo simulations in native CUDA, achieving 100x speedup over CPU implementations. POSITIONS OF RESPONSIBILITY: Head of the Google Developer Student Club (GDSC).

name: Vikram Patel
resume_text: EDUCATION: Electrical Engineering, CGPA: 7.8. SKILLS: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Firebase, Express.js, Figma, UI/UX. EXPERIENCE: Frontend Engineering Intern at Zomato (2024): Redesigned the checkout page interface, improving user conversion rate by 15%. Migrated legacy Redux state to Zustand reducing bundle size. Freelance Web Developer (2022-2023): Built and maintained 5+ robust e-commerce platforms for local businesses using Next.js, Stripe, and Vercel. PROJECTS: Real-time Collaborative Editor: Built a live Google Docs clone using React, WebSockets, and operational transformation algorithms for real-time syncing. Open Source UI Library: Open-sourced a highly customizable styled-components library on NPM with over 2,000 monthly downloads. POSITIONS OF RESPONSIBILITY: Design Head and Web Team Lead for Spring Fest.
